message:
fix(beads): add flock-based locking to AttachMolecule/DetachMolecule (gt-5xhzs)

AttachMolecule, DetachMolecule, and DetachMoleculeWithAudit all perform
read-modify-write on bead descriptions without synchronization. In
multi-agent Gas Town, concurrent CLI invocations can corrupt description
fields. Added per-bead advisory file locks (flock) to serialize these
operations. Also exported FlockAcquire from the lock package for reuse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
